name: Client contact form
description: Accessible ContactForm component plus a small fetch wrapper that posts to a configurable endpoint.
notes: Set VITE_CONTACT_ENDPOINT to your form handler (e.g. a Vercel serverless function, Formspree, or your own API). The form falls back to console.log when the env var is missing so dev still works without a backend.

files.content:
# Endpoint for the contact form (Formspree, Vercel function, custom API, etc.)
VITE_CONTACT_ENDPOINT=
